case_title: ROBERT FRANK CAMPBELL VS. NATIONAL BROOM CO. OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF DEMURRER OF NATIONAL BROOM COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA (TRANSACTION ID # 100009704) FILED BY RESPONDENT NATIONAL BROOM CO. OF CALIFORNIA, INC. DBA JLR GEAR

DECLARATION OF ROBERT F. CAMPBELL IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY PETITIONER CAMPBELL, ROBERT FRANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT NATIONAL BROOM CO. OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S DEMURRER TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OVERRULED. THE "SAME PARTIES" REQUIREMENT OF CCP 430.10(C) MANDATES THAT THE PARTIES STAND IN THE SAME RELATIONSHIP, I.E., AS PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT OR PETITIONER AND RESPONDENT, IN BOTH CASES. SEE PLANT INSULATION CO. V. FIBREBOARD CORP., (1990) 224 CAL.APP.3D 781, 788 (STATUTORY PLEA OF ABATEMENT REQUIRES "ABSOLUTE IDENTIFY OF PARTIES."). IN THIS CASE, THE RELATIONSHIPS OF THE PARTIES ARE REVERSED IN THE TWO ACTIONS. THE COURT SUA SPONTE ORDERS CASE CPF-15-514602 AND CPF-15-514610 CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE CPF-15-514602 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE. EITHER PARTY MAY CALENDAR A MOTION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORMAL FORM OF ORDER AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

calendar.matters:
Demurrer To Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT NATIONAL BROOM CO. OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S Demurrer To Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is overruled. The "same parties" requirement of CCP 430.10(c) mandates that the parties stand in the same relationship, i.e., as plaintiff and defendant or petitioner and respondent, in both cases. See Plant Insulation Co. v. Fibreboard Corp., (1990) 224 Cal.App.3d 781, 788 (statutory plea of abatement requires "absolute identify of parties."). In this case, the relationships of the parties are reversed in the two actions. The court sua sponte orders case CPF-15-514602 and CPF-15-514610 consolidated for all purposes. Case CPF-15-514602 is designated the lead case. Either party may calendar a motion to confirm the arbitration award. The prevailing party is to provide a formal form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
